meta.title: The Air Force can make it rain Anduril's new Barracuda Cruise Missiles
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Last week, California-based Anduril Instrustries unveiled their new “Barracuda” family of cruise missiles meant to address one of America’s most pressing strategic shortcomings: Its inability to produce munitions in sufficient numbers to sustain a large-scale conflict in the 21st century.

Let's talk about how... And what this could mean for the future of American AirPower.
